creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
It's been bothering me a couple of times in the past as well.

From the shell source it looks like that it should be created these days but on a Sept 2014 11-CURRENT snapshot it still is not.

A couple of places delete the directory and re-create it if I read /usr/lib/bsdinstall correctly.

I'll add nathan and dteske to Cc: as they are responsible for this code.
